---
page-layout: full
format: 
  html:
    css: vistales.css
---

::: {.index-page}
<div class="splash-container">
  <div class="splash-text text-left" id="text-left">Hi, I'm</div>
  <div class="splash-text text-right" id="text-right">Veronica</div>
  <div class="splash-text" id="combined">Hi, I'm Veronica</div>
  
  <div class="scroll-indicator">
    <span>Scroll to Explore</span><br>
    <i class="bi bi-chevron-down"></i>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
  document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
    const leftText = document.getElementById('text-left');
    const rightText = document.getElementById('text-right');
    const combinedText = document.getElementById('combined');

    // When the right text animation ends, merge them
    rightText.addEventListener('animationend', function() {
      leftText.style.display = 'none';
      rightText.style.display = 'none';
      combinedText.classList.add('show');
    });
  });
</script>
:::

<div style="padding: 100px 20px; text-align: center; max-width: 800px; margin: 0 auto;">
  ## Welcome to my portfolio
  
  I'm a data scientist and researcher focused on finding the stories behind the numbers. Explore my work using the navigation above.
</div>
